LightningComponentBundle.description: Displays a selected field from the current record in a fixed-height, scrollable panel especially useful for long text or rich content.

property.name: fieldApiName
property.label: Field API Name
property.description: Enter field API name from current record ex. Type__c.

property.name: height
property.label: Height (px)
property.description: Fixed component height in pixels. Content scrolls inside this height.

property.name: iconName
property.label: Icon Name
property.description: Salesforce Lightning Design System icon name. Ex. standard:account, utility:edit, etc.
